title: We keep giving you the best at CTM George
description: BUSINESS NEWS - For the third consecutive...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - For the third consecutive year, CTM George has won the Best Tile Shop award in the ‘Best of George Readers’ Choice Award! This is already a huge achievement and a confirmation of quality service, but we also won the award for the Best Tile and Flooring Company for the second time!


> CTM George is one of three brands in the Italtile group, the other two being Italtile and Top T. Italtile was founded by Giovanni Ravazotti, who immigrated to South Africa over 50 years ago.


Finding the choice of tiles in South Africa sadly lacking at the time, he started importing stylish Italian tiles that would beautify South African homes.

Fast forward 54 years and the Italtile group - thanks to his hard work, passion, and vision - is now the biggest in the business - with an integrated supply chain that supplies both our group and our competitors. Today, we still follow his example of working with passion.

The best for our customersCTM George started in 2009. Through droughts, fires, economic challenges and a pandemic, our customers have supported us these past 16 years. For that we are deeply thankful.

We always strive to provide them with the best service, best quality and best products at the most affordable prices - as is expected from our brand!

Continually improving our offeringDue to our growth, we relocated to our current, bigger premises opposite Kraaibosch Estate in 2013. The move allowed us to stock a wider range and provide our customers with a beautiful shopping experience and ample parking, and we are grateful to be able to say our existing customers stayed with us. Since then, new customers have joined us and friendships have formed.

To improve our offering even more, we are currently undergoing a major revamp. We trust that our loyal customers will bear with us while it is ongoing, knowing that they will be able to enjoy the benefits of the finished project. We are remaining open throughout the process and invite our customers to come and see how it progresses.

Our staff - wow!Integrity is one of our most important values, on par with customer service. This is where our staff play the main role. With their unique personalities, skills and work ethic, they don't let an opportunity pass to assist our customers and share their knowhow.

Using their expansive training, they ensure that customers' choices are best suited to their unique needs. We are sincerely thankful to our personnel who ensure they bring their A game to the job, every day.

You, our customersTo our customers - you are the heart of our business! Without you, there would be no us. Thank you for trusting us with all your building, development, renovation, and DIY needs, and thank you for coming back to us again and again.

We extend a huge thank you to each person who took the time to vote for us. Receiving the award as the Best Tile Shop for a third consecutive year and for the Best Tile and Flooring Company for the second time, is an incredible honour and inspires us to continue providing you with top service and the best products.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
